title: Enhance Team Invite Flow to Use Stytch Organizations
description:
## Context
As part of DataTools v2, the team invitation system needs to migrate from Salesforce-based authentication to Stytch Organizations. This enables broader authentication support beyond Salesforce.

## Changes
- Team invitations managed through Stytch Organizations instead of Salesforce orgs
- Support OTP-based invite links
- Support Google SSO authentication for invited users
- Maintain backward compatibility with existing Salesforce-based teams
acceptance_criteria: Team invites work through Stytch Organizations
Google SSO authentication works for invited users
Existing Salesforce-based teams continue to work
ux_changes: New invite flow supporting OTP-based links and Google SSO authentication.
middleware_changes: Stytch Organization integration for team membership management.
data_model_changes: Team membership model updated to support Stytch organization references.
api_changes: New endpoints for Stytch-based invite flow and organization membership.
implementation_notes: Part of DataTools v2 authentication architecture. Stytch Organizations replace Salesforce-only team management.
